summary.en: Where a motor-driven tool, electronic speed controller, charger, or power supply is in scope, Standards Organisation of Nigeria expects electromagnetic compatibility evidence as part of the SONCAP conformity assessment, generally against NIS standards that adopt the relevant IEC CISPR emission and IEC 61000 immunity series. The product must not generate excessive disturbance and must have adequate immunity, and EMC test reports must cover the actual marketed configuration.
summary.zh: 当电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器或电源属于适用范围时，尼日利亚标准组织在 SONCAP 合格评定中要求电磁兼容证据，通常依据采纳相关 IEC CISPR 发射和 IEC 61000 抗扰度系列的 NIS 标准。产品不得产生过量骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度，EMC 测试报告须覆盖实际销售配置。
summary.zht: 當電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器或電源屬於適用範圍時，奈及利亞標準組織在 SONCAP 合格評定中要求電磁相容證據，通常依據採納相關 IEC CISPR 發射和 IEC 61000 抗擾度系列的 NIS 標準。產品不得產生過量騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度，EMC 測試報告須覆蓋實際銷售配置。

standards_or_laws: NIS standards adopting IEC CISPR emission and IEC 61000 immunity series
SONCAP (SON Conformity Assessment Programme) EMC evidence as applicable

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports against GB standards alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, and whether the charger and battery pack were included still need re-mapping to the NIS EMC basis SON applies under SONCAP.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含依据 GB 标准的 EMC 报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况，以及是否包含充电器和电池包，仍需重新映射到 SON 在 SONCAP 下采用的 NIS EMC 依据。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含依據 GB 標準的 EMC 報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況，以及是否包含充電器和電池包，仍需重新映射到 SON 在 SONCAP 下採用的 NIS EMC 依據。

standards_or_laws: China GB EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A common gap is an EMC report that tests only the bare tool and omits the charger, battery pack, or controller variants, or that cites China GB limits without confirming acceptance under SONCAP. The SONCAP file should show the exact marketed configuration tested to the NIS-adopted IEC EMC basis.
gap.zh: 常见差距是 EMC 报告只测试裸工具，遗漏充电器、电池包或控制器变体，或引用中国 GB 限值而未确认 SONCAP 接受性。SONCAP 文件应显示按 NIS 采纳的 IEC EMC 依据测试的实际销售配置。
gap.zht: 常見差距是 EMC 報告只測試裸工具，遺漏充電器、電池包或控制器變體，或引用中國 GB 限值而未確認 SONCAP 接受性。SONCAP 文件應顯示按 NIS 採納的 IEC EMC 依據測試的實際銷售配置。

target.en: Mandatory within SONCAP scope: EMC evidence on the NIS-adopted IEC basis is required for in-scope electronic and motor-driven products as part of conformity assessment.
target.zh: 在 SONCAP 范围内强制：适用电子和电机驱动产品须在合格评定中提供基于 NIS 采纳 IEC 的 EMC 证据。
target.zht: 在 SONCAP 範圍內強制：適用電子和電機驅動產品須在合格評定中提供基於 NIS 採納 IEC 的 EMC 證據。

cn.en: China domestic files may include GB EMC evidence, but SONCAP acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and re-mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 GB EMC 证据，但 SONCAP 接受性取决于范围、限值、配置和重新映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 GB EMC 證據，但 SONCAP 接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置和重新映射。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Nigeria-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system on the NIS-adopted IEC basis and is accepted within the SONCAP conformity assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据按 NIS 采纳的 IEC 依据覆盖实际销售工具系统，并在 SONCAP 合格评定中被接受之前，不能视为尼日利亚就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據按 NIS 採納的 IEC 依據覆蓋實際銷售工具系統，並在 SONCAP 合格評定中被接受之前，不能視為奈及利亞就緒。
